## Security And Compliance

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, credentials, or private keys are committed.
- [ ] Browser-visible variables are intentionally prefixed with `NEXT_PUBLIC_`.
- [ ] Checkout, supplier, or compliance behavior fails closed.
- [ ] PHI, Rx-only, payout, or regulated workflows are unchanged or reviewed with counsel.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests/builds run locally or in CI.
- [ ] Secret scan or equivalent check run.
- [ ] Deployment impact reviewed.
